experiences.description: Worked on transmission and gearbox mechanical design for the Formula 1 car, contributing to process improvement initiatives within the engineering team.
Assisted the design engineering team on the Aston Martin Vantage GT3 Evo programme, contributing to component design and development for the GT racing car.
Hands-on mechanical work on World Rally Championship vehicles, gaining deep understanding of rally car systems and race preparation.
Combined mechanical and engineering duties on the Škoda Fabia Rally2, supporting race operations and vehicle maintenance during rally events.
